data.body: PASS 2 verification note (independent): The plan's "Either delete the dead typed leaf ... or make it the single production path and route the batch dispatch through it — chosen so there is no separately-tested parallel that production skips" leaves a real consolidation direction open; the stated criterion is structural and is satisfied equally by both directions. Grounding confirms the live production outbound flow is the batch path (applier.py:476 `_mutation_to_batch_dict` → applier.py:486 `_apply_batch`; the typed-leaf dispatch entry at reconcile.py:75 is bypassed for outbound), and batch_dispatch.py:374-540 has already absorbed the allowlist, parent/set_parent, labels, comments, and links from the typed leaf. NOTE on a finding citation: the "reconcile.py:476" reference is misattributed — reconcile.py:476 is `_build_filter_target_set` (unrelated); the production `_mutation_to_batch_dict`→`_apply_batch` flow is in applier.py (476/486). reconcile.py:75 and batch_dispatch.py:374-400 citations are accurate.
